meaning: n.生态学,[社会]环境适应学,均衡系统
examples: Oil pollution could damage the fragile ecology of the coral reefs.
Development has been guided by a concern for the ecology of the area.
We are reproducing ourselves at such a rate that our numbers threaten the ecology of the planet.
Wiry, sociable, in his early thirties, he worked as an ecology officer for the municipality.
And complementing the art is the museum's multimedia Riverama installation documenting the Hudson's fragile ecology.
